advert.brand: Smart energy smart meters by Smart energy gb
advert.description: The advert features a man checking his smart meter reading. The final frame at 02:00 shows the 'smart meters' logo and the call to action.
The ad showcases Vitamin C9 Daily UV skincare. The final frame at 02:19 displays the large 'GARNIER' logo on a black background.
The ad promotes fast broadband speeds and no upfront costs. The final frame at 02:49 clearly shows the 'EE' logo and 'EE FULL FIBRE' text.
The ad features older people recovering leg pain. The final frame at 03:19 shows the 'REVITIVE' title and retailer logos like Argos and Boots.
An animated fox orders food delivery. The final frame at 03:40 displays the text 'DID SOMEBODY SAY JUST EAT' as a title card.
A creative animation shows tools hanging from a birdcage. The final frame at 03:59 features the text 'Prices. Nailed.' and the B&Q logo.
A guy sells various items online including a guitar and a motorcycle. The final frame at 04:29 shows him riding the motorcycle out of the garage with the ebay logo overlaid.

advert.brand: Great ormond street hospital by Great ormond street
advert.description: A lottery ad for the Great Big Lottery benefiting Great Ormond Street Hospital. The final frame at 05:10 shows the prize tiers and the charity logos.
